title: eryngium ramboanum
intro: Eryngium ramboanum, also known as Rambo's sea holly, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Eryngium ramboanum include its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Eryngium ramboanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
